title: vicia latibracteolata
intro: Vicia latibracteolata, also known as the broad-leaved vetch or long-bract vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Vicia latibracteolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. Vicia latibracteolata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
